data.title: Key players collaborate at NYC Energy Week for data-driven decarbonization in real estate; 80-85% data coverage feasible for most firms.
data.description: Chris Pyke, a Chief Officer, emphasized that many companies can now achieve a data coverage of 80-85%. However, the focus should shift towards determining the purpose of this data. Moving beyond basic reporting, the emphasis is on comprehending the true dynamics of the assets.
UnitedHealth (UNH) cooperating with DOJ's criminal and civil inquiries.

data.title: Yiren Digital (NYSE: YRD) releases 2024 ESG report highlighting AI's impact on sustainability practices.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Yiren Digital Ltd. (NYSE: YRD) disclosed its annual ESG report for the year ending in December. Yiren Digital is a prominent company in Asia that offers a wide range of financial and lifestyle services using AI technology. This report is a significant milestone for the company as it highlights its environmental, social, and governance efforts. Through this release, Yiren Digital aims to provide transparency regarding its operations and performance in various areas. This move underscores the company's commitment to accountability and sustainability, setting it apart as a responsible player in the industry.

data.title: City of London Investment Group PLC provides pre-close trading update for the year ended June 30, 2025.(Symbol: LSE: CLIG)
data.description: On July 24, 2025, City of London, a prominent asset management group listed on the London Stock Exchange (LSE: CLIG), released a trading update for the financial year ending on June 30. The company specializes in managing institutional and retail investments, focusing on closed-end funds (CEFs). The update includes key performance indicators and financial metrics for the period leading up to the close of the fiscal year. City of London offers a diverse range of products tailored to meet the needs of both institutional and retail clients.

data.title: Australia's recommerce market to reach $4.68 billion by 2025 with an 11.3% annual growth rate and a 13.7% CAGR from 2020-2024.
data.description: The latest report on the Australia Recommerce Market reveals that the industry is set to expand significantly, with an anticipated annual growth rate of 11.3%, reaching a total market value of US$4.68 billion by 2025. From 2020 to 2024, the recommerce sector in Australia demonstrated strong growth, achieving a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 13.7%. This upward trend is expected to continue in the coming years, as detailed in the Q2 2025 update which includes over 60 key performance indicators related to market size, share, and forecasts based on channels, categories, and consumer segments.

data.title: Krispy Kreme (NASDAQ: DNUT) to reveal Q2 2025 results on August 7, 2025, with conference call at 8:30AM ET.
data.description: Krispy Kreme, Inc. (NASDAQ: DNUT) revealed its plans to release its second quarter financial results for 2025 on Thursday, August 7, 2025. The management will conduct a conference call and webcast at 8:30 AM ET on the same day to delve into the figures. The accompanying slide presentation for the webcast can be accessed on the investor relations portion of Krispy Kreme’s website at investors.krispykreme.com before the event kicks off.

data.title: Wipro secures multi-year deal with Saudi Electric Company for “Smart Grid” project.Characters: 77
data.description: Wipro Limited has secured a long-term strategic contract from Saudi Electric Company – National Grid SA, based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia and Bengaluru, India. This partnership is set to span multiple years and signals a significant milestone for Wipro in the region.

data.title: Mudita Kompakt E Ink phone receives key upgrades in latest MuditaOS K update following successful launch.
data.description: After a strong debut, the Mudita Kompakt, an award-winning minimalist E Ink phone, has been well-received by reviewers and continues to progress with improved features. The device, which launched in WARSAW, Poland on July 24, 2025, has garnered praise for its simplicity and functionality. The phone has achieved significant success with (mention important number of) units sold so far. Mudita is pleased with the positive feedback and is committed to further enhancing the device's capabilities to meet consumer needs.

data.title: Confie expands Freeway Insurance franchise into 28 states, marking significant growth in personal lines insurance distribution.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Huntington Beach, California, Confie revealed that its Freeway Insurance franchise program is experiencing significant growth and is now active in 28 states. This marks a notable expansion for the nation's biggest independent distributor of personal lines insurance. The company opened a new location to further establish its presence in the insurance market.

data.title: Global Partners LP to announce Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 7, with a conference call hosted by key personnel.
data.description: WALTHAM, Massachusetts-- Global Partners LP disclosed that it is set to reveal its financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2025 prior to market commencement on Thursday, August 7, 2025. Following this, the Partnership plans to hold a conference call for investors and analysts at 10:00 a.m. ET. The call will feature Eric Slifka, President, and CEO, along with Gregory B. Hanson, CFO, and Mark Romaine, COO. Interested parties can access the call at that time.

data.title: Eaton partners with We Energies for a new solar project to reduce carbon footprint at 5 Wisconsin locations. Net zero goal by 2050.
data.description: In Pittsburgh, Eaton, an intelligent power management company, is partnering with We Energies, a subsidiary of WEC Energy Group, to launch a clean energy project in Wisconsin. This initiative aims to enhance energy security, provide cost-effective power to the grid, and lower Eaton's carbon footprint at five Wisconsin locations where their research and operations are based. This move is part of Eaton's strategy to achieve net zero operations by 2050. Through this collaboration, Eaton is ramping up its efforts towards sustainability and carbon reduction, demonstrating its commitment to environmental responsibility.

data.title: Mineros reveals initial Mineral Resource estimate at Guillermina Deposit in Nicaragua, part of Hemco Property. Major milestone for the company.
data.description: In Colombia, Mineros S.A. has announced an initial Mineral Resource estimate for the polymetallic vein system Guillermina, located near the Porvenir Project on its Hemco Property in Nicaragua. The vein system, associated with hydrothermal breccias, is situated three kilometers north of the mentioned project. Mineros, listed as TSX:MSA and MINEROS:CB, highlighted Guillermina as a significant target within its portfolio of organic growth projects. This update indicates a positive development for the company in expanding its resource base.

data.title: PSQ Payments partners with Atrius Development Group after former vendor cancellation; ensures seamless checkout for firearms components.
data.description: In West Palm Beach, Florida, PSQ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PSQH) revealed its recent collaboration with Atrius Development Group, a prominent player in precision firearm components, subsequent to the abrupt termination of Atrius's payment services by a key vendor. PSQ Payments worked in tight partnership with Atrius to facilitate the integration of their operations, reinstate checkout capabilities, and guarantee continuous availability of their top-notch firearms components for the customers.

data.title: Allient Inc. (Nasdaq: ALNT) to host conference call and webcast for Q2 2025 financial results in Buffalo, N.Y.
data.description: Allient Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol ALNT, has disclosed that they will be holding a conference call and webcast to discuss their financial results for the second quarter of 2025. This announcement was made in Buffalo, New York.

data.title: Circle and Binance collaborate to support tokenized Real-World Assets, allowing Binance's institutional clients to hold Circle’s USYC.
data.description: In a recent update, Circle Internet Group, Inc. (NYSE: CRCL) revealed a strategic partnership with Binance, a prominent blockchain ecosystem and digital asset exchange. This collaboration aims to address the increasing need for tokenized Real-World Assets among Binance’s institutional clients. By joining forces, Circle and Binance are expediting their support services to cater to this rising demand. As a result, institutional customers of Binance now have access to hold Circle’s USYC, a premier tokenized money market fund (TMMF), amplifying opportunities in the sector.

data.title: U.S. home prices hit record high at $447,035 in June, but drop 5-10% for Russian, Japanese and European buyers due to weak dollar.
data.description: In June, the median price of a U.S. home increased by 1% to a record high of $447,035, impacting affordability for many residents. However, international buyers using currencies like Russian, Japanese, or European see a 5% to 10% decrease in home costs compared to the previous year due to the depreciation of the U.S. dollar. A recent report by Redfin revealed that U.S. home prices have dropped by nearly 10% in Russian rubles. Foreign currencies such as the Russian ruble, Japanese yen, and Euro have experienced a decrease in the typical home cost, making U.S. real estate more attractive to international buyers.

data.title: UK company sets new record, raising $135M for Bitcoin treasury acquisition. Becomes top regional BTC holder.
data.description: Satsuma Technology has secured $135 million to support a major Bitcoin treasury purchase in the UK, establishing itself as a leading regional holder of BTC.
